title: Battle of Ralltiir (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several battles taking place on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] in galactic history, including the following:

*'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''

:*The [[Capture of Cygnus Staff]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].
:*The [[Subjugation of Ralltiir]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].
:*The [[Ettam massacre]]
:*The [[Defense of Ralltiir]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
:*The [[Crackdown on Ralltiir]] in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].
:*A [[Battle of Ralltiir (4 ABY)|battle]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].
:*An [[Invasion of Ralltiir|invasion]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

*'''[[Second Imperial Civil War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Ralltiir (Second Imperial Civil War)|Battle of Ralltiir]]
